name: property managers handling 5–15 leases/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 leases/month, missed lease expiry notifications cause late renewals. We automate tracking and notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 leases/month, missed lease expiry notifications cause late renewals. We automate tracking and notifications instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars
